title: Breakable + Craftable Reinforced Deepslate
description: Allows Reinforced Deepslate to be broken with a pickaxe, or crafted in a crafting table.
body:
This pack allows players to craft Reinforced Deepslate using Bones and Deepslate.
This also allows players to break Reinforced Deepslate, but it is incredibly slow.

![Crafting Grid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/313ff66f21c2190148cfcb536d42ec935c4ed499.png)
